title: fimbristylis dichotoma var. nilagirica
intro: Fimbristylis dichotoma var. nilagirica, also known as Nilagiri fimbristylis, is a plant species belonging to the sedge family, Cyperaceae. It is a medicinal plant with various health benefits, and its rhizomes and leaves are used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The medicinal properties of Nilagiri fimbristylis include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The plant is used in herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be applied topically or consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
